query:
SELECT u.name, u.id, cp.id as phase_id, cp.label, cp.startDate, cp.endDate
FROM client_phases cp
JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.clientId
WHERE u.name LIKE '%Jake%' OR u.email LIKE '%jake%'
ORDER BY cp.startDate;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway05.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3K2x4Mgy2RpvvVT.root --database HZf6zqYa94nKHY3YxXLHa5 --execute

FROM client_phases cp
JOIN users u ON u.id = cp.clientId
